name: Kindergarten Spirit — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging through a close look at wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging.

lessons.title: Try it together: wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging through a guided practice with wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging.

lessons.title: Make or show: wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging through a small creation or demonstration about wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging.

lessons.objective: I can try a skill, use materials safely, and explain something I learned about wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging through a close look at wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging.

resources.title: Family-directed, non-devotional pathway
resources.description: Planning reference for this Kindergarten Spirit pathway.

units.title: Wonder and notice: wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging through a close look at wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging.

activities.title: A close look at wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in wonder, gratitude, family traditions, and belonging.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
